channel.title: GitHub Fortran Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Fortran in GitHub

item.title: firemodels/fds
item.description: Fire Dynamics Simulator

item.title: GEOS-ESM/MAPL
item.description: MAPL is a foundation layer of the GEOS architecture, whose original purpose is to supplement the Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF)

item.title: CVMix/CVMix-src
item.description: CVMix source code (including protex documentation) as well as build system and examples / tests

item.title: MCSclimate/MCT
item.description: Model Coupling Tookit

item.title: E3SM-Project/Ocean-BGC
item.description: This repository will house the columnized ocean BGC modules

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GEOSgcm_GridComp
item.description: Repository containing the physics and IAU code for the GEOS Earth System Model

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GEOS_Util
item.description: Repo containing GEOS Utilities for pre- and post-processing as well as plotting

item.title: LLNL/UMT
item.description: UMT (Unstructured Mesh Transport) is an LLNL ASC proxy application (mini-app) that solves a thermal radiative transport equation using discrete ordinates (Sn). It utilizes an upstream corner balance method to compute the solution to the Boltzmann transport equation on unstructured spatial grids.

item.title: NGEET/fates
item.description: repository for the Functionally Assembled Terrestrial Ecosystem Simulator (FATES)

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GMAO_Shared
item.description: Repository for GEOS Earth System Model shared infrastructure

item.title: MPP-LSM/MPP
item.description: Multi-Physics Problem (MPP) library is a standalone library that solves biophysics problems relevant to global land surface models (LSMs).

item.title: BeTR-biogeochemistry-modeling/sbetr
item.description: Standalone implementation of BeTR, the Biogeochemical Transport and Reaction module

item.title: CFMIP/COSPv2.0
item.description: COSP - The CFMIP (Cloud Feedbacks Model Intercomparison Project) Observation Simulator Package

item.title: SWMFsoftware/MFLAMPA
item.description: Multiple Field Line Particle Advection Model for Particle Acceleration for Solar energetic Particle (SP) domain

item.title: SWMFsoftware/Ridley_serial
item.description: Original Ridley Ionosphere electrodynamics Model

item.title: cp2k/cp2k
item.description: Quantum chemistry and solid state physics software package

item.title: SWMFsoftware/CIMI
item.description: Inner Magnetosphere, radiation belt and plasma sphere in IM

item.title: SWMFsoftware/GITM2
item.description: Global Ionosphere Thermosphere Model

item.title: SWMFsoftware/share
item.description: Shared tools for SWMF
